top_signals.title: Remarks by President von der Leyen at the dinner hosted by the Taoiseach for the start of the Irish Presidency of the Council of the European Union
top_signals.summary:
European Commission Statement Cork, 02 Jul 2026 Taoiseach,
dear Micheál,
Ladies and Gentlemen,
Thank you for such a warm welcome. It is a particular pleasure to join you in this historic Aula Maxima, where bo...
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Japan Cuts Gas in Favor of Coal as Hormuz Disruption Chokes LNG
top_signals.summary: Japan sharply reduced natural gas-fired power generation last month, instead relying more on coal, as disruptions around the Strait of Hormuz tightened supplies of the cleaner-burning fuel.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
